project.name: DearAI · Production Team Guide Explainer
project.source_panels: panduan_tim_panels.html (ID) and panduan_tim_panels_EN.html (EN) — 11 still panels at 1080×1920 each

audio_design.music_bed: minimal cinematic underscore, 60-75 BPM, electric piano + sub bass + analog pad. Warm, confident, no swelling drama. Ducks under VO by -8dB.
sfx_palette: soft mechanical key click for each slash command appearance (50ms attack, dry)
warm glassy chime for @-mention resolution (200ms decay, single note D5)
low whoosh transition between beats (300ms, neutral pan)
synth pulse for big numbers (480p, $0.08, 2 jam) — 80ms with sub kick
soft pad swell on Episode Pipeline reveal (1.2s rise, hold)
audio_design.vo_treatment: warm dry close-mic, slight compression, no reverb. Pace: confident-relaxed. Pause 0.4s between beats.

motion_principles: Slash commands type-on letter-by-letter, mono font, cyan color
@ mentions pulse + glow on appearance, then settle
Tables and panel screenshots fade-up with subtle 8px upward translate
Big numbers (480p, ~2 jam, etc.) snap-in on bass kick
Transitions = clean cuts on beat downbeats, no fancy wipes

id.narrator_profile: Indonesian male/female 25-35, Jakarta accent, warm confident tone. Like an internal team lead briefing colleagues — not corporate, not influencer.

en.narrator_profile: Singapore/SEA-English neutral 25-35, warm confident tone. Same vibe as ID version.

sequence.label: Hook / Cover
sequence.background: #060810 with cyan radial glow top-right (var(--c01) at 18% opacity, 600px diameter)

elements.text: Cara cepat pakai / commands · No coding

vo.id: Hai tim. Kalian mau buat episode microdrama 10× lebih cepat? Tonton 60 detik ini.
vo.en: Hey team. Want to ship microdrama episodes 10× faster? Watch this for 60 seconds.

sequence.video_prompt_seedance: Vertical 9:16 motion graphics. Dark navy background #060810 with subtle cyan radial glow at top-right corner. Large bone-white display type animates in left-aligned: 'DEARAI STUDIO' in mono (small cyan eyebrow), then 'PRODUCTION' (bone), then 'TEAM GUIDE' (cyan accent). Subtle cinematic music starts. Subtitle fades in below: 'Cara cepat pakai / commands · No coding'. Calm warm voice-over begins.

sequence.label: The Old Way (problem)

vo.id: Cara lama: kalian copy-paste prompt 600 kata. Salah ketik kode BytePlus. Lupa attach reference. Tiap orang hasilnya beda. Lambat. Frustrasi.
vo.en: Old way: copy-paste 600-word prompts. Mistype BytePlus codes. Forget the storyboard reference. Every team member outputs differently. Slow. Frustrating.

sequence.video_prompt_seedance: Vertical 9:16. Dark background. Red title fades in: 'TANPA / COMMAND...'. Below, four bullet points type in one by one over ~3 seconds — 'Copy-paste 600 kata', 'Salah ketik kode BytePlus', 'Lupa attach storyboard ref', 'Tiap orang hasilnya beda'. At 7s, all four lines get a clean red strikethrough drawn left-to-right in sync.

sequence.label: Slash command intro

vo.id: Cara baru: slash command. Tombol shortcut. Kalian ketik empat kata, Claude lakuin sepuluh langkah otomatis.
vo.en: New way: slash commands. Shortcut buttons. You type four words, Claude executes ten steps automatically.

sequence.video_prompt_seedance: Vertical 9:16. Huge cyan slash '/' appears center frame with glow effect. Below it 'command = TOMBOL SHORTCUT' in display type. Then near the bottom, '/vidgen set 1 V1' types out letter-by-letter in green mono with blinking cursor. Subtitle below: '→ Claude lakukan 10 langkah'.

sequence.label: The @ System

items.resolves_to: TARA ANJANI · still + face video + voice

vo.id: Sistem at. Satu tag, semua asset di Asset Library otomatis nyambung. At-tara, dapet gambar + video face + voice clip TARA. Gak hafal kode random.
vo.en: The at-system. One tag — every asset in Asset Library auto-attaches. At-tara pulls the still, the face video, the voice clip. No random codes to memorize.

sequence.video_prompt_seedance: Vertical 9:16. A massive cyan '@' symbol fills the center upper third of frame with a soft glow halo. Below it, three rows fade in one by one with glassy chime — '@tara → TARA ANJANI · still + face video + voice', '@kitchen → INT. Hanbyeol Bistro Kitchen', '@bibimbap → Bibimbap bowl prop'. Each tag in cyan mono, resolution in bone-white sans-serif.

sequence.label: /imggen — 4 storyboard modes

vo.id: /imggen punya empat mode. Default: stick figures tanpa wajah — buat validasi blocking, paling murah. Pencil, photoreal, atau sheet legacy kalau perlu override.
vo.en: /imggen has four modes. Default: featureless stick figures — for blocking validation, cheapest option. Pencil, photoreal, or sheet legacy when you need an override.

sequence.video_prompt_seedance: Vertical 9:16. Top: '/imggen' in cyan mono, 'four storyboard modes' below in muted text. Then four mode cards stagger in 2x2 grid: '--stick STICK FIGURES (DEFAULT)' highlighted with cyan border and glow, then '--pencil PENCIL SKETCH', '--photoreal PHOTOREAL', '--sheet SHEET LEGACY'. The default card pulses cyan at the end of the beat.

sequence.label: /vidgen — 4 video modes

examples.label: FREEFORM
examples.subtitle: Body + refs free. Test new scenes.

vo.id: /vidgen punya empat mode. Locked: pakai shotlist apa adanya. Hybrid: at-mention manual yang menang. Freeform: bikin scene dari nol. Raw: paste prompt full, edit bebas, fire as-is. Default 480p — murah dan cepat. Auto-save lokal di Desktop.
vo.en: /vidgen has four modes. Locked: use the shotlist as-is. Hybrid: explicit at-mentions win. Freeform: build a scene from scratch. Raw: paste the full prompt, edit freely, fire as-is. Default 480p — fast and cheap. Auto-saves locally to Desktop.

sequence.video_prompt_seedance: Vertical 9:16. Top: '/vidgen' cyan mono. Then four terminal-style example boxes stagger in: 'LOCKED — /vidgen set 1 V1', 'HYBRID — /vidgen set 1 V1 @tara @minjun @kitchen' (warm amber), 'FREEFORM — /vidgen @tara plating bibimbap di @kitchen' (purple), 'RAW — paste prompt → edit → fire' (muted). Each command types-on with key clicks. Final amber callout at bottom: 'Local copy → ~/Desktop/<Project> Generated Videos/'.

sequence.label: Bulk commands

elements.text: Sekali fire. Semua set / semua bible jadi.

vo.id: Mau fire semua sekaligus? Bulk commands. Storyboards, bibles, upload BytePlus, semua video — sekali ketik, jalan otomatis.
vo.en: Want to fire everything at once? Bulk commands. Storyboards, bibles, BytePlus upload, all videos — single command, runs automatically.

sequence.video_prompt_seedance: Vertical 9:16. Title 'BULK MODE' fades in. Below, four cards stagger into a 2x2 grid: '/imggen-all-storyboards · ALL STORYBOARDS · ~25min', '/imggen-all-assets · ALL BIBLES · ~30min', '/byteplus-upload-all · UPLOAD TO BYTEPLUS · ~10min', '/vidgen-all-sets · ALL VIDEOS · ~45min'. Green mono command names, bone-white titles, cyan time stamps.

sequence.label: Episode Pipeline reveal

vo.id: Tombol merah besar: slash episode pipeline. Script ke episode jadi, sekali fire, dua jam selesai. Enam step otomatis tersusun.
vo.en: The big red button: slash episode pipeline. Script to finished episode, single fire, done in two hours. Six steps chained automatically.

sequence.video_prompt_seedance: Vertical 9:16. Red 'BIG RED BUTTON' tag at top. Then huge cyan mono '/episode-pipeline' command. Below, six numbered steps animate in one by one with arrow drawing between them — /shotlist-gen → /imggen-all-assets → /byteplus-upload-all → /imggen-all-storyboards → /vidgen-all-sets → /episode-assemble. Final huge cyan-green gradient bar snaps in: '~2 JAM · 1 EPISODE FULL JADI' with bass kick.

sequence.label: Provider routing

vo.id: Provider routing locked. Storyboards, characters, costume, props, effects — Higgsfield. Lokasi — Reve. Video — BytePlus Seedance dua. Otomatis, gak perlu pilih.
vo.en: Provider routing is locked. Storyboards, characters, costume, props, effects — Higgsfield. Locations — Reve. Video — BytePlus Seedance two. Automatic, no manual picks.

sequence.video_prompt_seedance: Vertical 9:16. 'PROVIDER ROUTING' title. Then a compact 4-row table fades in row by row with provider chips: STORYBOARD+CHARS → HIGGSFIELD gpt_image_2 (cyan), COSTUME·PROPS·FX → HIGGSFIELD nano_banana_2 (cyan), LOCATIONS → REVE text-to-image (purple), VIDEO → BYTEPLUS Seedance 2.0 (green).

sequence.label: Outro / CTA

vo.en: When in doubt, ask. Happy producing.

sequence.video_prompt_seedance: Vertical 9:16. 'KALAU RAGU,' fades in white display, then huge cyan 'TANYA.' below. Subtitle: '#dev-help · #production · DearAI Discord'. Bottom of frame: 'Full guide: PANDUAN_TIM_PRODUCTION.md' in cyan mono. Music swells then buttons out.

remotion_hints.approach: One <Sequence> per beat, using interpolate() with the beat's start/duration for in/out timing. Each beat maps to a TSX component that takes the beat object as a prop and renders elements[] declaratively. Use <Audio> for music_bed at root, layered <Audio> for sfx per beat. <Video> for any live-action plate inserts.
components_to_build: <TextStack/> — ordered array of {text, size, color, font, animation}
<StepLadder/> — numbered step rows with arrow drawing between
<HugeCenteredStamp/> — display type stamp with stagger fade-up
remotion_hints.transitions: Cuts on beat downbeats by default. soft_pad_swell uses interpolate() opacity 0→1 over 36 frames. low_whoosh = 9 frame opacity dip + 9 frame return.

hyperframes_hints.approach: Each beat is a separate Hyperframes scene with native primitives (text, shape, image). Re-implement type-on as keyframe animation on text element with linear opacity per character. Background colors map to scene background. Audio cues become global timeline markers.

seedance_hints.fallback_path: If you don't have Remotion/Hyperframes infra, fire each beat as a standalone Seedance 2 vertical clip using its video_prompt_seedance string + audio_cues + vo overlay in post. Concat the 10 clips with clean cuts using ffmpeg or any NLE.

per_clip_specs.vo_strategy: ElevenLabs SEA-English or SEA-Indonesian, dropped over the Seedance plate in post

seedance_hints.limitation: Seedance won't render typography reliably — comp the text overlays in After Effects/Premiere/CapCut over the live plate. Treat Seedance as the visual texture; type/UI lives in post.

delivery_versions.use_case: SEA + global team, IG Reels public

delivery_versions.tightening_notes: trim each beat duration by 30%, drop beats 2 / 4 / 5 / 7 / 9

production_checklist: ✓ Render 11 panel PNGs at 1080x1920 from panduan_tim_panels.html (use Download All button)
✓ Decide language master (ID first if Indonesia team, EN for SEA/global)
□ Record VO from voice_overs.id or .en — 75s budget, calm warm tone, ElevenLabs or human read
□ Build Remotion comp using design_tokens + sequence array (or fire Seedance per beat)
□ Layer sfx_palette per beat audio_cues array
□ Add subtle music bed (-8db under VO)
